response.batch:
del positive

checkpointloadersimple.ckpt_name = 'sd_xl_base_1.0.safetensors'
emptylatentimage.width = 1024
emptylatentimage.height = 1024
positive = CLIPTextEncodeSDXL(clip=checkpointloadersimple.CLIP, text='masterpiece, best quality')
negative = CLIPTextEncodeSDXL(clip=checkpointloadersimple.CLIP, text='lowres, bad anatomy, worst quality')
done()

response.batch:
positive = CLIPTextEncodeSDXL(clip=checkpointloadersimple.clip, text_g='masterpiece, best quality', text_l='masterpiece, best quality', near=checkpointloadersimple)
negative = CLIPTextEncodeSDXL(clip=checkpointloadersimple.clip, text_g='lowres, bad anatomy, worst quality', text_l='lowres, bad anatomy, worst quality', near=checkpointloadersimple)
ksampler.positive = positive.CONDITIONING
ksampler.negative = negative.CONDITIONING
ksampler_2.positive = positive.CONDITIONING
ksampler_2.negative = negative.CONDITIONING
done()
response.message: We need to add SDXL‑style CLIP encoders (they require `text_g` and `text_l`), then wire them into both KSamplers.
